zh.lifeSummary: 當Ela Stapleton於大約1383年出生時，她的父親Sir Miles Stapleton III32歲，母親Ela Ufford22歲。她於大約1405年與Sir Robert Brewse在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1456年10月16日之後，埋葬在英國素福爾可伍德布里奇。

zh-hans.Woodbridge, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可伍德布里奇
zh-hans.Fressingfield, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可福雷辛費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ela Stapleton于大约1383年出生时，她的父亲Sir Miles Stapleton III32岁，母亲Ela Ufford22岁。她于大约1405年与Sir Robert Brewse在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1456年10月16日之后，埋葬在英国素福爾可伍德布里奇。

nameMeanings.name: Stapleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Stapleton (in Devon, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Herefordshire, Shropshire, Leicestershire, North Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Cumberland), all named in Old English with stapol ‘post, pillar’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The name is common in Ireland, where it has been established since medieval times in the counties of Tipperary and Kilkenny.

nameMeanings.name: Ela
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently an altered form of Hilda , not in use before the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Ela Stapleton was born about 1383, her father, Sir Miles Stapleton III, was 32 and her mother, Ela Ufford, was 22. She married Sir Robert Brewse about 1405, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died after 16 October 1456, and was buried in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ela Stapleton est née environ 1383, son père, Sir Miles Stapleton III, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Ela Ufford, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Brewse environ 1405, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 16 octobre 1456, et a été enterrée à Woodbridge, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ela Stapleton um 1383 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Miles Stapleton III 32 und ihre Mutter Ela Ufford 22. Sie hat um 1405 in England Sir Robert Brewse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 16. Oktober 1456 und wurde in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ela Stapleton è nata il circa 1383, sua padre, Sir Miles Stapleton III, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Ela Ufford, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Brewse circa 1405, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 16 ottobre 1456, e fu sepolta a Woodbridge, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ela Stapletonが約1383年に生まれた時，父Sir Miles Stapleton IIIは32歳，母Ela Uffordは22歳であった。約1405年にイギリスでSir Robert Brewseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1456年10月16日以後に死去し，イギリススフォルクウッドブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ela Stapleton(이)가 대략 1383년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Miles Stapleton III(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ela Ufford(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1405년 영국에서 Sir Robert Brewse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1456년 10월 16일 이후 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 우드브리지에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1383–after 16 October 1456: ойролцоогоор 1383 он–1456 оны Аравдугаар сарын 16–наас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ela Stapleton nasceu aproximadamente 1383, seu pai, Sir Miles Stapleton III, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Ela Ufford, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Brewse aproximadamente 1405, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 16 de outubro de 1456, e foi sepultada em Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ela Stapleton родилась около 1383 г., её отцу по имени Sir Miles Stapleton III было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Ela Ufford, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Brewse около 1405 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 16 октябрь 1456 г. и была похоронена в местности вудбридж, суффолк, Англия.

sm.about 1383–after 16 October 1456: e tusa o le 1383–ina ua ma'ea le 16 Oketopa 1456

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ela Stapleton nació aproximadamente 1383, su papá, Sir Miles Stapleton III, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Ela Ufford, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Brewse aproximadamente 1405, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió después de 16 de octubre de 1456, y fue sepultada en Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
